message:
fix(record): guard symbolic obligation registry against arena slot reuse aliasing

Extend the arena slot aliasing defense to SymbolicObligationRegistry's
by_holder and by_region secondary indexes — the same class of bug previously
fixed in ObligationTable and DeadlineMonitor.

Problem: when a TaskId or RegionId is recycled (arena slot reused after the
original entity completes), the by_holder and by_region Vec-indexed lookups
would return obligations belonging to the previous occupant of that slot,
corrupting obligation queries and region-drain operations.

Fix: change index types from Vec<Option<Vec<ObligationId>>> to
Vec<Option<(TaskId/RegionId, Vec<ObligationId>)>> so each slot tracks which
entity owns it:

- obligations_for_region(): verify stored RegionId matches before returning
- obligations_for_task(): verify stored TaskId matches before returning
- drain_region_obligations()/obligations_in_region_states(): verify stored
  RegionId matches before iterating
- register_symbolic_obligation(): if slot is occupied by a different entity,
  clear existing obligations before inserting new ones (same pattern as
  ObligationTable)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
